fault_hypothesis: The loop condition on line 56 is `len(order) > capacity`, but it should be `len(order) >= capacity`. This off-by-one error prevents the loop from running when the number of items is exactly equal to the capacity, failing to evict items to get strictly under capacity.

constraints.intent: The loop should not terminate when the number of items equals the capacity.
If no evictions occurred, the list size must have already been strictly under capacity.
If evictions did occur, the final list size must be strictly under capacity.
